AppFunctionAppMetadata.appfn:description: Skald is an audiobook and podcast player for self-hosted Audiobookshelf servers. Operational Patterns: - Use 'searchAndPlayAudiobook' when the user provides a title or author name but not a bookId. - Use 'playAudiobook' when you already have a specific bookId. - Always check if playback is already active before calling 'resumeCurrentPlayback'. - 'setSleepTimer' with minutes=0 cancels any active timer. - 'setPlaybackSpeed' persists the speed for all future sessions. Constraints: - All playback functions require the user to be logged in to their Audiobookshelf server. - bookId values are Audiobookshelf library item IDs (UUIDs), not human-readable titles.
